title: More Artifacts
description: Adds more curio items into the game that are highly inspired by terraria!
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3c3c900c6ee04fbd08e4c0982581c873a724aac.png)
# **Description:**


1.20.1 version requires Curios

This mod is highly inspired by Terraria and  Trinkets & Baubles!

As of now this mod adds 57 new artifacts into the game and will be receiving many more

More artifacts adds many different useful artifacts that can help you in different ways that suit your needs. Many of these artifacts can be obtained by crating or finding them as loot. These artifacts are very configurable to make fit in to any enviornment thats needed


![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c536a94e4d591078453add9a0d803d8d0aad606d.png) ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6245c16b0ff93836a6d4524be447b45e3d8b101.png)


![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f83918045d00d5d8acb2870f4647e0c2af5d190.png)

All Aqua colored numbers are configurable!



**Artifact list:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Bezoar - Poison immunity, obtained from cave spiders with a 5% chance

Vitamins - Weakness and Mining Fatigue immunity, obtained from elder guardians with a 40% chance

Sunglasses - Blindness immunity, obtained from crafting

Fast Clock - Slowness immunity, obtained from strays with a 2% chance

Nectar - Nausea immunity, obtained from crafting

Desert Charm - Hunger immunity, obtained from husks with a 2% chance

Shulker Heart - Levitation immunity, obtained from shulkers with a 15% chance

Wither Shard - Wither immunity, obtained from the wither with a 25% chance

Sculk Lens - Darkness immunity, can be crafted or obtained from ancient cities with a 10% chance

Ice Crystal - Freezing immunity, obtained from igloos
Cobalt Shield - Knockback immunity, obtained from dungeons with a 20% chance

Withered Bezoar - Poison and Wither immunity, obtained from crafting

Sculk Shades - Blindness and Darkness immunity, obtained from crafting

Shulked Clock - Slowness and Levitation immunity, obtained from crafting

Purifying Charm - Hunger and Nausea immunity, obtained from crafting

Obsidian Skull - Burning immunity, Reduces fire damage taken by 50%, obtained from crafting

Obsidian Shield - Knockback and Burning immunity, Reduces fire damage taken by 50%, obtained from crafting

Ankh Charm - Immunity to most debuffs, obtained from crafting

Ankh Shield -  Knockback and burning immunity, immunity to most debuffs, Reduces fire damage taken by 50%, obtained from crafting

Melody Plushie - Grants Regeneration , +20% Max Health, Provides a buff when sleeping, obtained from cats as a morning gift with a 5% chance

Hero Shield- Grants Resistance, ignore damage every 5 hits taken, 75% Explosion resistance, obtained from crafting

Mechanical Glove - +2 increased damage, obtained from crafting

Enderian Scarf - Reduces damage taken by 8%, obtained from endermen with a 1% chance

True Enderian Scarf - Enderman become neutral, Reduces damage taken by 10%, 10% chance to evade an attack, increases reach by 1, obtained from crafting

Gilded Scarf - Piglins are neutral, Reduces damge taken by 12%, 10% increased damage dealt, obtained from crafting

Balloon - Increases jump height, obtained from crafting

Lucky Emerald Ring - Hitting enemies have a 5% chance to drop emeralds, increases damage dealt against illagers by 25%, obtained from crafting

Spectre Amulet - Chance to heal the player upon attacking entities, obtained from crafting

Venom Amulet - Has a chance to poison attackers, obtained from crafting

Decay Amulet - Has a chance to wither attackers, obtained from crafting

Necroplasm Amulet - Chance to heal the player upon attacking entities, Has a chance to poison and wither attackers, obtained from crafting

Shackle - +1 increased armor, obtained from zombies with a 1% chance

Magic Quiver - increases arrow damage by 10%, 20% chance to not consume arrows, obtained from skeletons with a 1% chance or pillagers with a 4% chance

Envenomed Quiver - increases arrow damage by 15%, 20% chance to not consume arrows, arrows poison and wither hit enemies, obtained from crafting

Molten Quiver - increases arrow damage by 15%, 20% chance to not consume arrows, sets hit enemies on fire, increases damage by 5% if the hit entity is on fire, obtained from crafting

Wooden Headgear - +1 increased armor, reduces arrow damage taken by 5%, obtained from crafting

Golden Headgear - +2 increased armor, reduces arrow damage taken by 10%, obtained from crafting

Netherite Headgear - +3 increased armor, reduces arrow damage taken by 15%, obtained from crafting

Mechanical Claw - Increases melee damage by 15%, attacks have a 25% chance to inflict bleed, which deals 1 damage every second for 8 seconds, obtained from crafting

Echo glove - Increases melee damage by 5%, increases attack speed by 15%, attacks have a 10% chance to ignore invulnerability frames, obtained from crafting

Enderian Eye - Grants the ability to teleport where you are looking, with a max radius of 25 blocks and a 5 second cooldown, obtained from crafting

Ender Dragon Claw - Attacks have a 5% chance to deal 50% increased damage, can be dropped by the ender dragon with a 25% chance

Vanir Mask - Great stat and damage increase, unobtainable for now

Venom Stone - Grants immunity to Poison, 25% chance to inflict Poison II for 5 seconds, Deal 20% increased damage against enemies inflicted with Poison, 15% Chance to convert poison into a more dealdy variant, obtained from crafting

Decay Stone - Grants immunity to Wither, 25% chance to inflict Wither III for 3 seconds, Deal 20% increased damage against enemies inflicted with Wither, Attacking enemies affected by wither restores 1 heart, obtained from crafting

Fire Stone - Grants immunity to Fire, 25% chance to set enemies ablaze for 3 seconds, Deal 30% increased damage against enemies that are on fire, Enemies on fire ignite nearby mobs upon death, obtained from crafting

Ice Stone - Grants immunity to Freezing, 25% chance to freeze enemies for 8 seconds, Deal 10% increased damage against enemies that are on fire, obtained from crafting

Recall Potion - Allows teleporting to your spawn point, can be brewed or found in dungeons

Ruby Ring - Increases damage by 5% for every 20 max health, caps at 60 max health, can be found in piglin bations rarely

Nature's Mantle - Periodically grants regeneration when standing still, increases movement speed by 10%, can be crafted or found in jungle temples with a 20% chance

Tainted Mirror - Reflects any damage dealt back to the attacker, increases invunerability frames when reflecting damage, obtained from wardens with a 10% chance

Ender Dragon Eye - Grants night vision, makes endermen friendly and fight for you, +1% chance to summon an enderman upon being attacked, rare drop from ender dragon

Leather Treads - Increases movement speed by 5%, obtainnd from crafting

Dune Treads - Increases movement speed by 5%, further movement speed increase by 10% when on sand, obtained from desert temples with a 10% chance

Blazing Treads - Increases movement speed by 10%, prevents being damaged by hot blocks. flame trail!, obtained from crafting

Enderian Treads - Increases movement speed by 20%, attempt to avoid taking fatal damage by void stepping away, 60 second cooldown, obtained from crafting

Sculk Treads - Increases movement speed by 25%, walking no longer emits vibrations, obtained from crafting

Mechanical Gears - Increases movement speed by 2%, 5% Chance to dodge incoming attacks, obtained from crafting

High Jumpers - Increases movement speed by 10%, increases jump height and reduces fall damage

</details>




# **Mod Compatabilities:**

[Enhanced Visuals](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enhancedvisuals)

[Spartan Weaponry](https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-weaponry)

[Ice and Fire: Dragons](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragons)

[Simply Potion Rings](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-potion-rings)

[Apothecary](https://modrinth.com/mod/apothecary)

(some of these will be expanded upon)






# **Future Plans:**

Models for many of the artifacts

Animated textures for many of the artifacts

More artifacts in general / More Compatabilities with other mods
